thread.title: Florence County man found not guilty on allegation of sexual assault
thread.title_full: Florence County man found not guilty on allegation of sexual assault

author: Tonya Brown
title: Florence County man found not guilty on allegation of sexual assault
text: FLORENCE COUNTY, S.C. (WPDE) — A jury has found Garrett Andrew Tanner not guilty of criminal sexual conduct first degree Friday afternoon following a week-long trial at the Florence County Judicial Center, according to Tanner's attorney Rose Mary Parham. We are grateful that Garrett and his family finally received justice after five years. We appreciate the jury’s service and verdict in this case," said Parham. Tanner was one of three people arrested in November of 2019 in connection with the sexual assault of a minor. Authorities responded to a call involving allegations of sexual assault of a minor in Pamplico. The Sheriff's Office said the victim was assaulted in a vehicle near Pamplico. The victim was taken to the hospital for "treatment of physical trauma sustained during the incident." TOP STORY: Hania Aguilar's killer used homemade key in escape attempt before & after sentencing: RCSO Two others are still waiting to be tried in the case. ABC15 reached out to Twelfth Circuit Solicitor Ed Clements for a comment on the jury's decision. We'll let you know when we hear back from him.
